name: agritrace-ai
description: AI-powered agriculture platform with blockchain supply chain tracking

scripts.db:migrate: cd packages/prisma && npx prisma migrate deploy
scripts.render:build: npm install; cd packages/prisma && npm install && npx prisma generate && cd ../.. && cd apps/backend && npm run build
scripts.vercel:build: npm run build; npm run db:generate; npm run db:migrate
